params.value: SELECT CreatedById, COUNT(Id) oppCount FROM Opportunity WHERE CreatedDate >= 2026-01-01T00:00:00Z AND CreatedDate <= 2026-03-31T23:59:59Z AND Account.Bookings_last_12_months__c = 0 AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CreatedById IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE') GROUP BY CreatedById
